title: HostTrade Seed Schema
description: JSON schema for HostTrade entity seeds — matches the host_trades table and HostTradeSchema (SPEC-241)

id.description: Seed identifier (not the DB UUID — resolved at runtime via idMapper)

name.description: Display name of the tradesperson or business

slug.description: URL-safe slug (optional — server auto-generates from name if omitted)

contact.description: Contact information — phone number or wa.me deep-link

benefit.description: Benefit or special terms for hosts who mention Hospeda

destinationId.description: Seed destination ID (e.g. '011-destination-concepcion-del-uruguay') — resolved to real UUID at runtime

is24h.description: Whether the provider is available 24 hours a day

scheduleText.description: Human-readable schedule when not 24h (e.g. 'Lunes a Viernes 8:00–18:00')

isActive.description: Whether this entry is publicly visible in the host directory

createdById.description: Seed user ID for the creator — resolved to real UUID at runtime (use 'super-admin-user' or 'admin-user')
